items.title: Starbucks Sales Still Show Weakness. Same-Store sales Dip 2%.
items.description: Shares of coffee chain Starbucks tumbled nearly 4% after the market close, but then quickly turned around.

items.title: Are Americans squandering their retirement savings on eating out?
items.description: Americans spend almost as much dining in restaurants every year as they owe in student debt.

items.title: McDonald’s Hong Kong property sale draws investor interest
items.description: Despite the sale, the McDonald's outlets will continue their operations.

items.title: Starbucks Reports Earnings Tuesday. There May Be Some ‘Reinvention Fatigue.’
items.description: Cafe chain Starbucks will report earnings for the June ended quarter after the market close Thursday.

items.title: McDonald’s Snack Wrap is likely driving repeat visits
items.description: New data from Numerator also shows that consumers will eat less at other chains now that the item is available at the Golden Arches
